multiplechoiceresponse.label: What is the main limitation of post-hoc explanations in modern machine learning systems such as deep neural networks?

choice.div: They may offer intuitive justifications that do not reflect the model’s actual decision-making process.
They always provide transparent symbolic reasoning that matches human cognition.
They can approximate predictions with confidence scores but fail to show differences between instances.
They clearly highlight discriminative features like stripes or facial structures but ignore generalization issues.

div.p: The transcript highlights that while deep learning models can produce highly accurate predictions, their decision-making process is often opaque. Post-hoc explanations are limited because they tend to give intuitive, human-like justifications that may not correspond to the real internal logic of the model, especially when bias is present.
